name: Chocolate Caramel Swirl Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 13 x 9-inch (33 x 23 cm) pan with shortening.
2. In a large bowl, combine the shortening, brown sugar, one tablespoon water, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into the creamed mixture.
3. Gradually mix in flour, cocoa, salt, and baking soda into the creamed mixture at low speed until just combined.
4. Melt caramels: Place caramels and remaining 1 tablespoon water in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave at full power for 2 minutes, stirring. If not melted, continue microwaving an additional minute or place in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring often until fully melted.
5. Spread half of the chocolate mixture in the greased pan. Distribute the melted caramel evenly over the chocolate. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the caramel. Spread the remaining chocolate mixture over the caramel and chocolate chips.
6. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the center is set. Cool in the pan on a cooling rack. Cut into bars. Makes: 3 dozen bars
